user.title: Connect to LLM API
user.description: Set up your configurable LLM API connection. Works with Anthropic-compatible APIs including the official API, z.ai, and other compatible services.

data_description.api_key: Enter your API key for the LLM service.
data_description.base_url: Enter the base URL for your LLM API endpoint. Default is Anthropic's official API. Use z.ai or other compatible services by entering their base URL.

error.authentication_error: Authentication failed. Please check your API key.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the API. Please check your base URL and network connection.
error.timeout_connect: Connection timeout. The API took too long to respond.
